qa_pairs.question: In the Metrix portal's CPU account statistics, how is filesystem activity represented?
qa_pairs.answer: Filesystem activity for a CPU account is represented by two graphs: the left graph shows the number of disk write commands, also known as input/output operations per second (IOPS), while the right graph displays the amount of data transferred to the servers over a given period, referred to as Bandwidth.

qa_pairs.question: Which jobs are listed under the CPU account statistics section of the Metrix portal?
qa_pairs.answer: The CPU account statistics section of the Metrix portal lists the last jobs run by all members of the group.
